Class Card

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.model.Card
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, org.atlanmod.risk.core.Card
public class Card extends Observable implements Serializable, org.atlanmod.risk.core.Card
Card class which represents the card model of the Risk game. It provides methods for performing operations on the cards like exchange cards for armies etc.
Author:
Palash, Ruthvik Shandilya

      public boolean isExchangePossible(List<Card> selectedCards)
      Method is used to verify , if cards can be exchanged for army or not

      Returns:
      true if the exchange is possible; otherwise false
